## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What does the current behavior make hard?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it affects scope, RBAC, cleanup, or the security model, say how
it interacts with the cluster-admin caveat (see SECURITY.md / VISION.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related requirements (FR/NFR) if known.
